prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRT-2000LUMENFLASHLIGHT-STD Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 2000 Lumen 5-Stage Rechargeable Flashlight with Adjustable Beam and SOS Mode, 7.5 Inches Description: Equip yourself with the dependable power of this 2000 lumen rechargeable tactical flashlight, built for field use, emergency readiness and rugged outdoor conditions.

Engineered for performance, it features five tactical lighting modes: 100%, 50%, 25% brightness, Strobe and SOS, so you can maintain visibility, signal for help, or adapt to any environment in seconds. The adjustable focus design transitions smoothly between a concentrated spotlight for long range targets and a wide floodlight for area illumination, ensuring mission ready versatility.

Constructed from heavy duty aluminum alloy, this tactical flashlight is designed to withstand tough conditions without compromising on portability. Its compact 7.5 inch size and integrated wrist strap make it easy to carry in your gear bag, glove box, or emergency kit.

Powered by a rechargeable 2500mAh battery with a five to six hour charge time via the included micro USB cable, this flashlight delivers reliable, long lasting illumination, perfect for tactical operations, survival kits, camping trips, or any scenario where dependable light is critical. Search Terms: tactical flashlight; camping tactical gear; camping accessories essentials; emergency preparedness items; edc gear; bug out bag; flashlight rechargeable; emergency supplies; survival gear and supplies; earthquake emergency kit; 2000 lumen flashlight Features: - 2000 LUMEN LED POWER: Delivers ultra bright light output with a high intensity 2000 lumen LED bulb for superior visibility in low light or outdoor conditions - 5 VERSATILE LIGHTING MODES: Switch between 100%, 50%, 25% brightness, Strobe, and SOS modes to meet tactical, emergency, or everyday needs with ease. - ADJUSTABLE FOCUS BEAM: Quickly change from a narrow spotlight to a wide floodlight by pushing or pulling the flashlight head—perfect for camping, hiking, and search missions - COMPACT AND EASY TO CARRY: At only 7.5 inches length, with an included wrist strap, this flashlight is perfect for outdoor adventures, emergency kits, tactical gear or bug out bags - HEAVY DUTY ALUMINUM CONSTRUCTION: Built with durable, lightweight aluminum alloy for long-lasting reliability, even in rugged conditions. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 2000 Lumen Rechargeable Tactical Flashlight

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 7.5 in Rechargeable Tactical Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2000 Lumen LED, 5 Lighting Modes, Adjustable Beam, SOS Emergency, USB Rechargeable

openai.title_differentiation: 2000 Lumen, 5 Mode, Adjustable Focus, Strobe And SOS, Aluminum Body, Micro USB Rechargeable
